title: fagraea havilandii
intro: Fagraea havilandii, also known as the Havilandia or fragrant frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Borneo and is highly valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, including antioxidant, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Fagraea havilandii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders.
